scripts.build:web: cd apps/app && npx expo export --platform web
scripts.test: bun test packages/protocol packages/daemon packages/runner apps/cli packages/relay
scripts.type-check:all: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/cli/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/relay/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/runner/tsconfig.json && cd apps/app && npx tsc --noEmit
